briefdescription.para: The type for the exit code.
A list of command line arguments.

detaileddescription.para:
Calling this method is thread-safe and can be used to post events from other threads.
If you make calls from other threads, ensure that the application has been constructed and is not shutting down. You must make sure that your threads are terminated, before the application instance is destroyed. Do this by adding wait or join at the end of main or similar functions.
std::logic_error
if no application instance exists.

briefdescription.para: Special value to indicate that the event loop shall continue.
A snapshot of the command line arguments.
Sanity flag, to check if init/... methods were called.
The main page for this application.
Create a new UI application using the default Terminal backend.
Create a new UI application using the default Terminal backend.

detaileddescription.para:
Stores the command line arguments.
argc
The number of command line arguments
argv
The command line arguments

briefdescription.para: Create a new UI application using a custom Terminal backend.

parameterdescription.para: The terminal backend to use. Must not be null.

briefdescription.para: Create a new UI application using a custom Terminal backend.

detaileddescription.para:
Stores the command line arguments.
argc
The number of command line arguments
argv
The command line arguments
terminal
The terminal backend to use. Must not be null.

briefdescription.para: Set the main page for this application.

detaileddescription.para: The main page is automatically registered as the initial page in the display, just before the event loop starts.

parameterdescription.para: The new theme. A null pointer restores the default dark theme.

simplesect.para: Only access and manipulate the terminal from the main thread that owns this application.
Only access and manipulate the display from events!

detaileddescription.para: This will initialize the terminal and start the event loop. If the event loop exits, the screen is restored. Any exception from the event loop will be propagated.

simplesect.para: The exit code of the application.

briefdescription.para: Test if this application is shutting down.
Add an event to the event loop.

detaileddescription.para:
If the application is shutting down, this call is ignored.
eventType
The event type.
eventData
The event data.

briefdescription.para: Queue one callback on the application UI thread.

parameterdescription.para: The callback to execute on the UI thread.
If the application event system is not active anymore.

briefdescription.para: Create one managed background event thread.

detaileddescription.para:
The application automatically stops managed event threads during shutdown.
The started event thread.
std::logic_error
If the application event system is not active anymore.
This will schedule a quit event and exit the event loop as soon as all scheduled events up to this quit event are processed.

This aborts the application as soon as possible. Events in the event loop are not processed.
Use quit() to exit the application gracefully.

simplesect.para: Only use this method if you need to drive the event loop manually.

cExitCodeContinue if everything is ok and the application shall go into the event loop. Any other value is a return value to use when exiting the application. Before exiting the application, manualShutdown() must be called.

parameterdescription.para: exception that may occur during initialization.

briefdescription.para: Refresh the Display, read input and process events.

simplesect.para: Only use this method if you need to drive the event loop manually.

cExitCodeContinue if everything is ok and the loop shall continue. Any other value is a return value to use when exiting the application. Before exiting the application, manualShutdown() must be called.

parameterdescription.para: Any exception that may occur during run.

simplesect.para: Only use this method if you need to drive the event loop manually. This method must be called before exiting the application in every case.

briefdescription.para: Set up the main page of your user interface, Overwrite this class to set up your UI before the application is initialized.

detaileddescription.para: At this point, nothing is initialized. Your implementation must call setMainPage() to set the main page of the application.
Extend this method to perform additional initialization steps after command line arguments are processed.

You can extend/overwrite this method to perform additional terminal initialization steps or change the terminal initialization behavior. You must make sure the base implementation is called once. By default, this method initializes the screen and configures key input mode.

Overwrite this method to parse the command line arguments at the start of the application. Return cExitCodeContinue if everything is fine and the application should continue to start. Any other value returned will cause the application to exit with that value. At this point, setupUi() has built the surface tree and the terminal is initialized, but the UI event system is not active yet.
args
The command line arguments.
The exit code to use when exiting the application or cExitCodeContinue if everything is fine.
Only extend this method if you need to change the event loop behavior or have to perform work just before or after running the event loop.

briefdescription.para: Restore the terminal to its original state.

detaileddescription.para: By default, this method only calls restoreTerminal().
You can extend this method to perform additional shutdown steps.

briefdescription.para: Get the shutdown timeout for managed event threads.
Get the current number of managed event threads.

detaileddescription.para:
Primarily useful for tests and diagnostics in derived classes.
The number of currently tracked managed event threads.

simplesect.para: cExitCodeContinue if initialization was successful, otherwise an error code.
cExitCodeContinue if events were processed successfully, otherwise an error code.

briefdescription.para: Forward a key press event to the display.

parameterdescription.para: The key press event to forward.

briefdescription.para: Set this application into a new state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfaceWeakPtr &surface, ScheduledActionRef actionRef, uint64_t generation, EventDataUniquePtr &&eventData, EventTime eventTime)
memberdef.name: scheduleAction

parameterdescription.para: The due time for the scheduled action event.

briefdescription.para: Arm all existing surface schedulers in the given subtree.
Calculate the next timeout for terminal input polling.

detaileddescription.para:
A return value of zero causes Input::readKey() to perform a non-blocking poll.
The timeout for Input::readKey().

briefdescription.para: Verify that the event system is active and still accepts new work.
Stop all managed event threads and wait for them to end.
Remove finished or expired managed event threads from the tracking list.
Remove finished or expired managed event threads from the tracking list.
Try to access the active application instance.

simplesect.para: The active application instance, or nullptr if no application exists.

briefdescription.para: UI Application instance for event-driven UI applications.
